(2, 3), (8, 8), (1, 6), (2, 2), (9, 9)

I look at columns, rows, and boxes in many orders. I am keeping track of candidates and eliminating options with respect to the initial rules.

*   I check for missing digits in rows, columns, and 3x3 boxes. I am comparing these to find cells with only one possible answer. I am looking for the "low hanging fruit" to keep the momentum going. This may require some backtracking if it ends up contradicting a previous entry.

*   I notice some missing digits in various boxes and rows, and deduce how they can be combined.

*   I have identified additional candidates and eliminate options to deduce the solution. This requires significant bookkeeping on what digits remain to fill.
